info.description: SDS Admin API for domain management
info.title: SDS Admin API

get.description: Retrieve a list of all domains

post.description: Create a new domain with the provided information

get.description: Retrieve a single domain by its ID

put.description: Update an existing domain with new information

delete.description: Delete a domain by its ID (soft delete)

post.description: Disable a domain by setting its status to inactive
Enable a domain by setting its status to active

get.description: Retrieve a list of DNS records for the specified domain
get.summary: List DNS records for a domain

post.description: Create a new DNS resolution record under the specified domain

get.description: Retrieve a single DNS record by its ID

put.description: Update an existing DNS record with new information

delete.description: Delete a DNS record by its ID (soft delete)

post.description: Disable a DNS record by setting its disabled flag to true
Enable a DNS record by setting its disabled flag to false

get.description: Retrieve a list of all record types

post.description: Create a new record type with the provided information

get.description: Retrieve a single record type by its ID
get.summary: Get a record type by ID

put.description: Update an existing record type with new information

delete.description: Delete a record type by its ID (soft delete)

host.description:
Host record, e.g. www, @, *.
主机记录，如 www, @, *

mxPriority.description:
MX record priority. Only required for MX records, value range 0-65535.
MX记录优先级。仅MX记录需要，取值范围0-65535

recordTypeId.description:
Record type ID (1=A, 2=AAAA, 3=CNAME, 4=MX, etc.).
记录类型ID（1=A, 2=AAAA, 3=CNAME, 4=MX等）

remark.description:
Remark or description for this record.
记录的备注或说明

ttl.description:
Time to live in seconds. Default is 300.
生存时间（秒），默认为300

values.description:
Record values. At least one value is required.
记录值列表。至少需要一个值

total.description:
Total number of records.
记录总数

disabled.description:
Whether the record is disabled.
记录是否禁用

domainId.description:
Domain ID that this record belongs to.
此记录所属的域名ID

mxPriority.description:
MX record priority. Only present for MX records.
MX记录优先级。仅MX记录有此字段

recordType.description:
Record type name (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, etc.).
记录类型名称（A, AAAA, CNAME, MX等）

recordTypeId.description:
Record type ID.
记录类型ID

remark.description:
Remark or description.
备注或说明

ttl.description:
Time to live in seconds.
生存时间（秒）

updatedAt.description:
Last update time.
最后更新时间

isDefault.description:
Whether this is the default value. Required for A/AAAA/CNAME records.
是否为默认值。A/AAAA/CNAME记录必须有一个默认值

clientCidr.description:
Client IP CIDR for smart DNS resolution.
客户端IP网段，用于智能DNS解析

isDefault.description:
Whether this is the default value.
是否为默认值

disabled.description:
Whether the record is disabled.
记录是否禁用

host.description:
Host record, e.g. www, @, *.
主机记录，如 www, @, *

mxPriority.description:
MX record priority. Only required for MX records, value range 0-65535.
MX记录优先级。仅MX记录需要，取值范围0-65535

remark.description:
Remark or description for this record.
记录的备注或说明

ttl.description:
Time to live in seconds. Default is 300.
生存时间（秒），默认为300

values.description:
Record values. At least one value is required.
记录值列表。至少需要一个值

ApiKeyAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
ApiKeyAuth.name: Authorization
